step_rationale: Connective-tissue structural gene; aortic matrix integrity links to fibrous-cap stability.
mechanism: COL6A3 maintains extracellular matrix integrity in the arterial wall and atherosclerotic plaque, supporting fibrous-cap resistance to degradation.

references.title: Exploring Potential Drug Targets in Multiple Cardiovascular Diseases: A Study Based on Proteome-Wide Mendelian Randomization and Colocalization Analysis.
Genomic insights in ascending aortic size and distensibility.
